task: Put the multi USB charging cable in the gray box
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A cluttered shelf with various items. A gray box is on the lower shelf, and a multi-USB charging cable (black, coiled) is on the middle shelf. The cable is flexible and tangled. STRATEGY - First, reach and grasp the cable to untangle it. Then, transport it to the gray box. Finally, place the cable inside the box. Failure modes include dropping the cable during transport or not fully placing it inside the box. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the cable body to locate it. Step 2 grasp the cable body to pick it up. Step 3 transport the cable to the gray box. Step 4 place the cable inside the gray box.

Goal: inside(multi_USB_charging_cable, gray_box)
Scene: multi_USB_charging_cable, gray_box, shelf
Step 1: reach(multi_USB_charging_cable)
  affordance_region: the body of the multi_USB_charging_cable
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, multi_USB_charging_cable, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, multi_USB_charging_cable) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(multi_USB_charging_cable)
  affordance_region: the body of the multi_USB_charging_cable
  contact: holding(multi_USB_charging_cable) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(multi_USB_charging_cable)
Step 3: transport(multi_USB_charging_cable -> gray_box)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the gray_box
  spatial: above(multi_USB_charging_cable, gray_box, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(multi_USB_charging_cable)
  done_when: above(multi_USB_charging_cable, gray_box, 0.05)
Step 4: place(multi_USB_charging_cable -> gray_box)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the gray_box
  contact: surface_contact(multi_USB_charging_cable, gray_box) [completion]; released(multi_USB_charging_cable) [completion]
  pose: inside(multi_USB_charging_cable, gray_box) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(multi_USB_charging_cable, gray_box) AND released(multi_USB_charging_cable)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: an empty area inside the gray_box
an empty area inside the gray_box
